name: Narcolepsy Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for narcolepsy including narcolepsy with cataplexy, without cataplexy, secondary narcolepsy, and narcolepsy in other conditions. Used as an exclusion condition in ADHD medication follow-up measures and stimulant prescribing quality measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Narcolepsy in conditions classified elsewhere, with cataplexy
Narcolepsy in conditions classified elsewhere, without cataplexy
Idiopathic hypersomnia with long sleep time
Idiopathic hypersomnia without long sleep time
